arts.ttl: Real Madrid fined by UEFA and threatened with future stadium ban following homophobic chants aimed at Man City boss Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: In addition to the club's fine, Madrid have been warned by European football's governing body that further bad behaviour could result in a partial stadium ban.

arts.sum: The former Stoke teammate of Charlie Adam was given his debut by Jose Mourinho

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fined for homophobic Guardiola chants
arts.sum: Real Madrid are fined by Uefa after some of their fans directed homophobic chants towards Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola in their Champions League second-leg tie at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo branded 'embarrassing' in comparison with Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has come under fire for his petulant behaviour following Al Nassr team-mate Jhon Duran's sending off as he kicked a ball into the stands and reprimanded the referee, but was spared any punishment

arts.ttl: Official: Real Betis confirm Barcelona star Vitor Roque’s departure
